title: I think Yui has bad taste in men
display_title: I think Yui has bad taste in men
wikitext:
[]: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Wed Jan 05, 2022 5:15 pm Think about it, a man like Gendo Ikari, a man broken on the inside, was a part of the conspiracy to bring about the world’s end and the end to all human life, and became the poor excuse of the father and abandoned his own son. Just what was Yui thinking when she decided to marry a man like him? Sure, she pitied him when he was at his low point, but she should have known better that he would end up being the worst father in history.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Wed Jan 05, 2022 6:01 pm I think, though, this subversion of the bad boy trope in NGE as it plays like she went after the bad boy hoping she could fix him, and it worked for a while then she saw how much of an asshole he'd been to Shinji and eat him in EOE. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Jan 05, 2022 9:56 pm We are talking about a woman who, when presented with a preventable apocalypse which followed a clear set of rules, devised literally the most complex and dangerous survival plan imaginable, part of which involved transforming herself into a Japanese robot mom and sailing the cosmos as an ark of human souls. Yui's great at taking a goal and finding the most absurd way to reach it. There's a reason I like to call her Screwy Yui.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jan 05, 2022 11:15 pm Well, I would say Gendo has bad taste in women. His obsession with Yui is a very realistic portrayal of emotional dependency. Giving love and attention to someone, only to eventually stop (going elsewhere, leaving the other person behind). This is a classic way of manipulating people into obsessing about you. Gendo's obsession played well for Yui in the long run. I'm not saying she's evil or anything. Just not the type of woman I would want in my life...

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by YTPrenewed » Mon Jan 10, 2022 9:54 pm Plenty of otherwise bad people turn out to have a genuine soft spot for their loved ones. Was Yui supposed to assume Gendo couldn't possibly be one of them? If a guy who got in a few fights in college (might be recalling ep 21 wrong, but I think that was mentioned as the biggest supposed red flag) isn't fit to be a father, then Yui turning him down wouldn't have stopped, let's say, Ritsuko, from later impregnating herself off him instead. The most reliable prevention would be to have him sterilized. Too extreme? Perhaps, but one of the natural consequences of not doing so is that he gets to become a (biological) father. I get that abuse and neglect are tricky, and it sometimes seems easier to say "you should've known better" than to try to come up with actual prevention strategies. But whatever practical solutions are out there, victim-blaming isn't one of them. At best it's unfair to those who wanted to give those they loved a second chance in a world not exactly otherwise known for second chances. At worst it'd only encourage even more would-be abusers to conceal their true nature until the baby is born, putting us all the way back at square one, except this time around without as much reason why they "should've known better".

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Sun Jan 16, 2022 1:48 am IronEvangelion wrote: Yui's great at taking a goal and finding the most absurd way to reach it.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by Natalie the Cat » Mon Jan 17, 2022 1:31 pm ::KL7:: wrote: IronEvangelion#933567 wrote: Yui's great at taking a goal and finding the most absurd way to reach it.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Jan 22, 2022 4:23 am Natalie the Cat wrote: ::KL7::#933769 wrote: This may be one of my favorite quotes on Evageeks. But in all honestly, why do women always seem to go for the douche bags? To answer your question CT, yeah, she does.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jan 23, 2022 11:18 am C.T.1290 wrote: Just what was Yui thinking when she decided to marry a man like him? Sure, she pitied him when he was at his low point, but she should have known better that he would end up being the worst father in history.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by YTPrenewed » Wed Jan 26, 2022 11:52 pm orcot wrote: Natalie the Cat#933786 wrote: Because they shoot their shot. Women date guys that actually ask them out. More to the main topic, though: Everyone in Eva has bad taste in everyone. Unless their taste is Ritsuko. She's perfect.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by EvaChero » Thu Jan 27, 2022 9:31 am I guess my take is....Gendo was a rebellious radical and Yui was a lab rat. She found this attractive as opposites tend to do and decided like many unfortunates, that she could stabilize or "fix" him. Then the bottom dropped out of the world and all this "Angel" crap got real. With brilliant foresight she decided on a dangerous course of action to influence the cataclysmic outcome to bring her baby boy to the forefront. SEELE grossly underestimated her influence/control in the Eva Core. Unfortunately for Yui she didn't anticipate that her disappearance would send Gendo into a psychotic break, his caring and soft side completely submerged or expunged and a new "GendoBot" arose to fulfill former Gendo's single minded desire to reunite with his wife. Her peevishness at his actions was illustrated in the "Mantis" scene in EOE. Less bad taste and more tragic IMHO ....of course this is just my headcanon/fanwank worth approx 25yen if that much.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by ::KL7:: » Sun Feb 06, 2022 9:17 pm Natalie the Cat wrote: ::KL7::#933769 wrote: This may be one of my favorite quotes on Evageeks. But in all honestly, why do women always seem to go for the douche bags? To answer your question CT, yeah, she does.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by AWinters » Tue May 10, 2022 2:27 pm Hold up. Gendo Ikari? The man who conspired with a cult to build giant biobots to fight God while plotting to destroy the world, liquify all life on earth and use his own son as a pawn - all to bring his wife back? I'm worried about how high your bar is.

[]: Re: I think Yui has bad taste in men.             Quote Post by orcot » Thu May 12, 2022 12:01 am AWinters wrote: Hold up. Gendo Ikari? The man who conspired with a cult to build giant biobots to fight God while plotting to destroy the world, liquify all life on earth and use his own son as a pawn - all to bring his wife back? I'm worried about how high your bar is.
